name: Barbell
description: A long steel bar used for compound lifts like squats, deadlifts, and bench press.

name: Dumbbell
description: Short hand-held weights used for isolation and compound exercises.

name: Kettlebell
description: Cast iron weight with a handle, ideal for dynamic movements.

name: Pull-up Bar
description: A horizontal bar mounted overhead for pulling exercises.

name: Bench
description: Adjustable padded bench used for pressing and seated exercises.

name: Squat Rack
description: A rack with adjustable safety bars for barbell squats and presses.

name: Resistance Band
description: Elastic bands providing variable resistance for many exercises.

name: Medicine Ball
description: A weighted ball used for power and conditioning exercises.

name: Yoga Mat
description: A non-slip mat for floor exercises, yoga, and stretching.

name: Treadmill
description: A motorized running machine for indoor cardio.

name: Rowing Machine
description: A cardio machine that mimics the motion of rowing a boat.

name: Jump Rope
description: A rope used for jumping exercises, excellent for cardio.

name: Cable Machine
description: A weight machine with adjustable pulleys for various exercises.
